zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Walter De Frost Frostenden I於大約1337年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可福洛斯登時，他的父親Sir Donald Bild de Frostenden Constable29歲，母親Arvegods26歲。他於1368年與Lady Alice在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1372年在英國素福爾可福洛斯登享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特波利聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Walter De Frost Frostenden I于大约1337年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可福洛斯登时，他的父亲Sir Donald Bild de Frostenden Constable29岁，母亲Arvegods26岁。他于1368年与Lady Alice在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1372年在英国素福爾可福洛斯登享年36岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特波利聖 瑪麗 馮 維吉恩斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Frost
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Danish, and Swedish: nickname for someone who suffers from being cold, or perhaps used in the sense ‘frosty, cold as frost, without warmth of feeling’, or perhaps ‘having the appearance of being covered with frost’ for one with white hair or a white beard. From Old English, Old High German, Old Norse frost ‘frost’.

variants.name: Chell
meanings: English (Staffordshire): from an unrecorded Middle English male or female personal name Chell(e) or Chele, Old English Cēolla, Cēol, or Cēola, short forms of names beginning with Cēol- ‘ship’, such as Cēolbeorht (male) and Cēolflǣd (female). Alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English chele, chile (Old English cīele, cēle, cȳle) ‘cold, lacking sympathy’. Compare Frost .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Walter De Frost Frostenden I was born about 1337, in Frostenden, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Donald Bild de Frostenden Constable, was 29 and his mother, Arvegods, was 26. He married Lady Alice in 1368, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1372, in Frostenden, Suffolk, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in St Mary The Virgin's Church, Bury, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Walter De Frost Frostenden I est né environ 1337, à Frostenden, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Donald Bild de Frostenden Constable, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Arvegods, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice en 1368, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1372, à Frostenden, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary The Virgin's Church, Bury, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Church of St Mary the Virgin, Bury, Bury: St Mary The Virgin's Church, Bury, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Walter De Frost Frostenden I um 1337 in Frostenden, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Donald Bild de Frostenden Constable 29 und seine Mutter Arvegods 26. Er hat 1368 in England, United Kingdom Lady Alice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1372 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Frostenden, Suffolk, England und wurde in St Mary The Virgin's Church, Bury, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter De Frost Frostenden I è nato il circa 1337 nel Frostenden, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Donald Bild de Frostenden Constable, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Arvegods, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice nel 1368, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1372, nel Frostenden, Suffolk, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mary The Virgin's Church, Bury, Greater Manchester, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Walter De Frost Frostenden Iが約1337年にイギリスイギリススフォルクフロステンデンで生まれた時，父Sir Donald Bild de Frostenden Constableは29歳，母Arvegodsは26歳であった。1368年にイギリスイギリスでLady Aliceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1372年にイギリススフォルクフロステンデンで36歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグレアター マンチェスターブリースト マリー ス バージン'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Church of St Mary the Virgin, Bury, Bury: 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 버이 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Walter De Frost Frostenden I(이)가 대략 1337년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프로스텐든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Donald Bild de Frostenden Constable(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Arvegods(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1368년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lady Alice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1372년 영국 수폴크 프로스텐든에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 버이 스트 메리 테 버긴'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Walter De Frost Frostenden I nasceu aproximadamente 1337, em Frostenden, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Donald Bild de Frostenden Constable, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Arvegods, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice em 1368, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1372, em Frostenden, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary The Virgin's Church, Bury, Greater Manchester, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Church of St Mary the Virgin, Bury, Bury: ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, бури, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Walter De Frost Frostenden I родился около 1337 г. в местности фростенден, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Donald Bild de Frostenden Constable было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Arvegods, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice в 1368 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1372 г. в местности фростенден, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри т виргин'с чурч, бури, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания.
